---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Software — Lucia S. Layritz"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <p class="category">Software</p>
  <h1>Software</h1>
  <p style="max-width:600px; color:#444; margin-top:0.8rem;">
    Open-source code accompanying research papers, side projects, and tools. 
    Most work is in R and Python; some JavaScript.
  </p>
</div>

<div class="project-grid">

  <a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/disturbanceBorealLPJ" target="_blank" style="border-bottom:none;">
    <div class="project-card">
      <p class="lang">R</p>
      <h3>disturbanceBorealLPJ</h3>
      <p>Reproduction code for the boreal forest disturbance and climate change paper (Biogeosciences, 2025).</p>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/stableEWS_paper" target="_blank" style="border-bottom:none;">
    <div class="project-card">
      <p class="lang">R</p>
      <h3>stableEWS_paper</h3>
      <p>Reproduction of the early warning signs paper — tipping points with non-Gaussian-stable noise (Scientific Reports, 2025).</p>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/alphastableTransient" target="_blank" style="border-bottom:none;">
    <div class="project-card">
      <p class="lang">Jupyter / Python</p>
      <h3>alphastableTransient</h3>
      <p>Code for "Disturbances and long transients create illusion of stable states".</p>
    </div>
  </a>


  <a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/borealRecovery" target="_blank" style="border-bottom:none;">
    <div class="project-card">
      <p class="lang">R</p>
      <h3>borealRecovery</h3>
      <p>Analysis code for post-disturbance boreal forest recovery modelling.</p>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="https://github.com/lucialayr/backgammon" target="_blank" style="border-bottom:none;">
    <div class="project-card">
      <p class="lang">JavaScript</p>
      <h3>backgammon</h3>
      <p>A simple interactive backgammon board in the browser.</p>
    </div>
  </a>

</div>
```
